name: Mauritius Mass Finder
update_message_en: A new version of Mauritius Mass Finder is available.
update_message_fr: Une nouvelle version de Trouver une Messe à Maurice est disponible.
notes: Header simplification release. Top-header Share removed; app-level sharing retained in the lower help area; result-card Mass sharing, update flow, bottom navigation, search, filters, Near Me, Next Mass, My Churches, and bilingual mode preserved.
